role: Brigadier General; Intelligence Chief, Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters (d. 14 March 2026)
bio: Abdullah Jalali-Nasab served as a Brigadier General and head of intelligence at the [Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters](/orgs/khatam-al-anbiya-central-headquarters). He was killed on 14 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave), in the same strike that killed Major General [Abolqasem Babaeian](/people/abolqasem-babaeian).
editorial_notes: Killed 14 March 2026. Brigadier General, Khatam al-Anbiya Intelligence.
